# Web cache: openclaw 六阶段流水线 深度剖析 汤师爷 架构设计 site:github.com

> 时间: 2026-03-08 06:55


## 1. 
- 来源: duckduckgo

2 weeks ago - Gateway/Restart: fix restart-loop edge cases by keeping openclaw.mjs -> dist/entry.js bootstrap detection explicit, reacquiring the gateway lock for in-process restart fallback paths, and tightening restart-loop regression coverage. 3 weeks ago - This optimization is critical for OpenClaw's economics - sessions load substantial context (skills, memory, system prompts) that would be expensive to re-send uncached on every turn. 1 week ago - 项目推荐 我开发了一个开源项目 ClawBus，专门为 OpenClaw 设计的多 A
